name: claw-kit
description: Thin Codex adapter for claw-kit with fixed code-mode plan and Goal synchronization.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt-driven .claw harness with compact workflowGuidance and hook-collected plan reports.
interface.longDescription: Use using-claw-kit as the main-agent guidance and lifecycle contract. Follow recovered workflowGuidance as the only next-step contract, create a plan when reusable project knowledge is expected, and keep it discussing until downstream tasks are explicit and handoff-ready. On Codex, every plan mutation runs through the fixed code-mode driver.
defaultPrompt: Start with using-claw-kit. If a .claw workflow is already recovered, follow its returned workflowGuidance before creating anything.

Start with using-claw-kit. When no task scope exists, create a plan if reusable project knowledge is expected; otherwise work directly. A created plan may remain in process.discussing, and enters process.active only when downstream tasks are explicit and the user can hand off execution.

Start with using-claw-kit. On Codex, run every claw plan mutation only through its fixed code-mode driver; the program consumes hostActions and the agent must not execute goalTool or split host calls.
